data_flow_pipeline.entry_point: User invokes bat CLI -> main.rs -> run() function parses command-line arguments

stages.responsibility: Parse command-line arguments, resolve file inputs, and read file content
stages.input: Command-line arguments, file paths, stdin stream
stages.output: Input struct with file metadata, InputReader, Config struct

stages.responsibility: Load syntax definitions, themes, and style components; detect syntax for input files
stages.input: Input file paths, Config settings, theme preferences
stages.output: HighlightingAssets, selected Theme, StyleComponents, detected SyntaxReference

stages.responsibility: Create the main controller that orchestrates the printing pipeline
stages.output: Controller instance ready to process inputs

stages.responsibility: Determine which lines to display, preprocess content, prepare line decorations
stages.input: InputReader content, line range specifications, NonprintableNotation settings
stages.output: Filtered lines with preprocessing applied, decoration metadata

stages.responsibility: Apply syntax highlighting, convert to styled output with ANSI escape sequences
stages.input: Preprocessed lines, detected syntax, selected theme, style components
stages.output: Lines with ANSI-styled text, escape sequence offsets

stages.responsibility: Render headers, footers, line numbers, grid borders, and line change markers
stages.input: Styled lines, decoration specifications, file metadata
stages.output: Complete formatted output with all visual elements

stages.responsibility: Write formatted output to terminal or pager
stages.output: Terminal output via stdout or pager process

data_flow_pipeline.exit_point: OutputHandle writes to stdout or spawns pager process; terminal displays syntax-highlighted, formatted file content

input.rs.role: Handles all input sources: files, stdin, and readers

config.rs.role: Parses command-line arguments and builds Config struct

assets.rs.role: Manages syntax definitions and themes; detects syntax for files

syntax_mapping.rs.role: Maps file extensions and names to syntax definitions

theme.rs.role: Handles theme selection and color scheme detection

printer.rs.role: Applies syntax highlighting and renders formatted output

vscreen.rs.role: Parses and manages ANSI escape sequences

line_range.rs.role: Parses and manages line range specifications

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Parses CLI arguments into Config struct
Converts file paths and stdin into Input objects

cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Raw line string -> processed line string
File metadata, style config -> decoration strings
File path -> mapped SyntaxReference or None

extension_proposal.feature: HTML output mode for exporting syntax-highlighted code as HTML
required_changes: Create HtmlPrinter implementing the Printer trait
Modify controller.rs to select printer based on output format
integration_points: Stage 5 (Syntax Highlighting): HtmlPrinter replaces InteractivePrinter when HTML output is selected
Stage 7 (Output): OutputType routes to file or stdout without pager in HTML mode
Config: New output_format field determines printer selection
